message:
chore: expand gitignore for agent ephemeral files, e2e results, and patch artifacts

Add ignore rules for files that accumulate from concurrent agent sessions
and automated test runs:

- .codex_space_probe: Codex agent workspace probe file
- .tmp-*/: agent temp directories (.tmp-azuredesert, .tmp-ext-opt,
  .tmp-callgrind.*, .tmp-opt-proof*, .tmp-pi-post-*, etc.)
- .white_deer_target/: agent alternate build target directory
- *.orig, *.rej: patch/merge conflict artifacts from failed applies
- tests/e2e_results/: timestamped e2e test run output directories that
  grow unboundedly (dozens of runs per day across concurrent agents)
- __pycache__/, *.pyc: Python bytecode caches from conformance test
  tooling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,3 +28,20 @@ tests/ext_conformance/reports/*
 *.sqlite3-wal
 *.sqlite3-shm
 *.sqlite3-journal
+
+# Agent probe/scratch files and temp directories
+.codex_space_probe
+.tmp-*/
+.tmp-*
+.white_deer_target/
+
+# Patch/merge artifacts
+*.orig
+*.rej
+
+# E2E test run results (timestamped, ephemeral)
+tests/e2e_results/
+
+# Python bytecode caches
+__pycache__/
+*.pyc
